author: artisticat
description: Make typesetting LaTeX math as fast as handwriting through snippets, text expansion, and editor enhancements.

manifest.author: artisticat
manifest.description: Make typesetting LaTeX math as fast as handwriting through snippets, text expansion, and editor enhancements.
manifest.name: Latex Suite

name: Latex Suite

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
* priority tabout was using opening delimiters instead of closing causing it to work like normal tabout (https://github.com/artisticat1/obsidian-latex-suite/pull/533)

Note: not sure what unintended bugs this would cause so releasing it right after it was found.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
* Add snippetless mode for certain macros like `\tag` or `\begin` (https://github.com/artisticat1/obsidian-latex-suite/pull/527)
* Shift enter didn't always exit the matrix in inline math (https://github.com/artisticat1/obsidian-latex-suite/pull/529)
* Automatically add cells in align (https://github.com/artisticat1/obsidian-latex-suite/pull/531)
* prioritize tabout over matrix shortcuts when braces enclose the cursor (https://github.com/artisticat1/obsidian-latex-suite/pull/421)

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
- Fixes another syntax error in the default snippets
- Fix only `\text` being recognized as a text environment instead of https://github.com/artisticat1/obsidian-latex-suite/blob/96bd080ed8b87ea63a0db703eaf5c0c84b90baad/src/utils/default_text_areas.ts#L7-L33

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: - Fixes syntaxerror in the default snippets (#525)

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
* added snippet for display math inside lists using proper indentation (by @Sinthoras7 in https://github.com/artisticat1/obsidian-latex-suite/pull/511).
* Don't highlight `\{,\}` when highlighting inner brackets for the math preview (https://github.com/artisticat1/obsidian-latex-suite/pull/520).
* Treat environment names inside `\begin{...}` and `\end{...}` as text  and update `beg` snippet to ignore when there is a `\\` before (https://github.com/artisticat1/obsidian-latex-suite/pull/524).

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
# Features
* Redoing a snippet now reinserts the tabstops and tabstops can be traversed backwards (https://github.com/artisticat1/obsidian-latex-suite/pull/499).
* Add the ability to customize keymaps of tabout, snippet expansion and next/previous tabstop (https://github.com/artisticat1/obsidian-latex-suite/pull/443).
 For example:
 ```js
 const snippet = {trigger: "", replacement: "$$0$", options: "t", triggerKey: "Ctrl-m"}
 ```
 where you use `Ctrl-m` to turn on math mode. Both the `triggerKey` and `trigger` will be checked and format needs to be in [cm6 format](https://codemirror.net/docs/ref/#view.KeyBinding). For more examples see https://github.com/artisticat1/obsidian-latex-suite/issues/439.
 (there needs to be no other hotkey, plugin or vim keymap taking priority over latex suite).

* Add editor command to toggle all features (https://github.com/artisticat1/obsidian-latex-suite/pull/508).
 Only turns them on if all of them are turned off.
* Add logs/debugging for snippet expansions. (https://github.com/artisticat1/obsidian-latex-suite/pull/495)
* Completed the list of text environments and removed `\mathrm` from text environments. (https://github.com/artisticat1/obsidian-latex-suite/pull/385)
* Add support for ^ and _ for auto enlarge brackets (https://github.com/artisticat1/obsidian-latex-suite/pull/505).
* Autofraction for `()/` becomes `\frac{$0}{$1}$2` now (https://github.com/artisticat1/obsidian-latex-suite/pull/436).
* Optimize snippet expansion speed (https://github.com/artisticat1/obsidian-latex-suite/pull/450).
 The difference will be more noticable in large files than in smaller files,
 but not super noticable. You can check the speed difference by spamming the `(` snippet.
* Added most conceal symbols (https://github.com/artisticat1/obsidian-latex-suite/pull/386).
* Optimize conceal slightly by caching equations and concealspecs (https://github.com/artisticat1/obsidian-latex-suite/pull/445).
* Keep indent/blockqoute levels the same when expanding snippets (https://github.com/artisticat1/obsidian-latex-suite/pull/466).
* Enable visual snippets and matrix shortcut for vim (https://github.com/artisticat1/obsidian-latex-suite/pull/359)
* Added support for codelanguages (https://github.com/artisticat1/obsidian-latex-suite/pull/503)
 For example:
 ```js
 const snippet = {trigger: "npp", replacement: "import numpy as np", options: "c", language: "python"}
 ```

# Bug fixes
* Skip size controls for auto enlarge brackets (https://github.com/artisticat1/obsidian-latex-suite/pull/504).
* Ignore brackets that have different `{` nesting level (https://github.com/artisticat1/obsidian-latex-suite/pull/507).
* Improved default snippets (https://github.com/artisticat1/obsidian-latex-suite/pull/388).
* Global regex unions (`/a|b/`) don't have to encapsulated with a group anymore (https://github.com/artisticat1/obsidian-latex-suite/pull/448).
* Math preview no longer overflows for large equations (https://github.com/artisticat1/obsidian-latex-suite/pull/496)
* Fixed home key going in between `\frac|` when `\frac` was at the beginning of the line (https://github.com/artisticat1/obsidian-latex-suite/pull/458).
* Fixed the location of the vim blockcursor  (https://github.com/artisticat1/obsidian-latex-suite/pull/438).
* Hide ">" in blockmath when blockqoutes are active (https://github.com/artisticat1/obsidian-latex-suite/pull/387).
* Text recognized as math at end of a callout (https://github.com/artisticat1/obsidian-latex-suite/pull/501).


Snippetleaf (the overleaf port) will have the ones related to latex at a later time.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: * Account for multiple viewports in livepreview causing text between math being recognized as math (#490)

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: * Fix for when text was detected as displaymath when a callout environment last math environment was displaymath. (https://github.com/artisticat1/obsidian-latex-suite/pull/488)

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
* Detect codebounds better and check for null such that it doesn't crash the plugin (https://github.com/artisticat1/obsidian-latex-suite/pull/459)
* Detect math environments better in nested environments such as callouts and lists (https://github.com/artisticat1/obsidian-latex-suite/pull/486)
* Cursor and bracket highlighting in math preview (https://github.com/artisticat1/obsidian-latex-suite/pull/455)

# Math preview

A cursor such as ▶ will be placed roughly around the cursors position in the preview.
Not exact because the preview might break if ▶ was in the middle of a command.
Below can a example be seen:

https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/87c1e7f1-7e83-4bde-b156-d786a55efbb6

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: * Fix for opening large documents which broke the whole plugin (https://github.com/artisticat1/obsidian-latex-suite/pull/482).

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
* Conceal gt and lt (https://github.com/artisticat1/obsidian-latex-suite/pull/379 by @MegaAndi3000)
* Restore the command tabindent for selections (https://github.com/artisticat1/obsidian-latex-suite/pull/365)
* Auto-indent for Newlines for matrix shortcuts (https://github.com/artisticat1/obsidian-latex-suite/pull/375 by @Testudinidae)
* `mathrm` and `color` are now treated as text instead of math (https://github.com/artisticat1/obsidian-latex-suite/pull/384)
* Make all occurrences of a snippet variable be replaced in the snippet   (https://github.com/artisticat1/obsidian-latex-suite/pull/420 by @tzimom)
* Disable Auto subscript when in `\ce` environment (https://github.com/artisticat1/obsidian-latex-suite/pull/412)

* Optimize performance of cursor movement in LaTeX blocks (https://github.com/artisticat1/obsidian-latex-suite/pull/398 by @HerrChaos)
* Remove conflict with delta greek symbol and nabla in default snippets (https://github.com/artisticat1/obsidian-latex-suite/pull/456 by @wuacs)
* Completed word delimiter list (for ascii). (#457)
* Android/gboard keyboard support (https://github.com/artisticat1/obsidian-latex-suite/pull/403 by @oldkingOK)
* Enhance Tabout: Expand delimiters, refactor constants, and add LaTeX \right support. (https://github.com/artisticat1/obsidian-latex-suite/pull/374 by @Testudinidae)
* Caching optimizations for conceal logic. (#479)
* Improved math parsing logic (#479, #416, #433)

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
- Matrix shortcuts will now run in the `gather` environment as well. (#343 by @llakala)
- Conceal `dfrac`, `tfrac` and `gfrac` in addition to `frac`. (#344 by @llakala)
- Conceal `\operatorname`. (#353 by @vreithinger)
- Matrix shortcuts now work in inline math as well. (#362 by @AJCubed)

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
- When using Conceal, you can now delay the reveal of LaTeX under the cursor. This makes it much easier to navigate equations using arrow keys when Conceal is enabled.
  (Closes #283, thanks to #332 by @shunby and @bdm-k)

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
- Improved handling of tabstops, thanks to #306 by @bdm-k.
- Improved performance of Latex Suite in large files by ~10X, thanks to #323 by @shunby.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: - When backspacing inside empty inline math (`$|$`), the closing `$` symbol will be automatically deleted as well. (#266 by @bdm-k)

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
- The math popup preview no longer blocks LaTeX source code for long inline math equations when its position is set to "Below". (#288 by @bdm-k)
- When an IME is active, snippets are now disabled by default. (#286 by @RyotaUshio)

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
- Improved the [default snippets](https://github.com/artisticat1/obsidian-latex-suite/blob/main/src/default_snippets.js).
  - Reorganised snippets into categories and added more comments.
  - Added shortcut `"` -> `\text{}`.
  - Added shortcut `\sum`<kbd>Tab</kbd> -> `\sum_{i=1}^{N}`.
  - Added snippets under "Misc" section that enable you to automatically convert lone letters or Greek letters in text to math.
  - Made some snippets less aggressive.
- You can now choose to load snippet variables from files, as well as snippets from files. (#280 by @itay-raveh)
- The "highlight matching bracket" highlight is now more visible.
- Updated the appearance of snippet placeholders.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
- The math popup preview can now be positioned below instead of above your equation source, so it doesn't obscure text above your equation (#257 by @bdm-k)
- Added `lVert` and `rVert` default snippets, auto-enlarge and conceal (#253 by @Comprehensive-Jason)
- Snippets can now have more than 9 tabstop placeholders (#256 by @git-wil)
- Default snippets: Added overbrace shortcut (#249 by @you-n-g)
- Default snippets: Matrix environment snippets (e.g. pmatrix) now take into account block/inline math

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
- Auto-enlarge `lfloor`, `rfloor`, `lceil`, `rceil` (#226 by @m4rch3n1ng)
- Added default snippets for `floor` and `ceil` (#227 by @m4rch3n1ng)

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
- Fixed Latex Suite causing cards to be blurry in canvases. (#187)
- Fixed auto-fraction removing parentheses in `(a)(b)/` when it shouldn't. (#206, #220 by @duanwilliam)

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
- You can now use Regular Expression literals in snippet triggers! e.g. The regex snippet
  ```typescript
  {trigger: "([A-Za-z])(\\d)", replacement: "[[0]]_{[[1]]}", options: "rA"}
  ```
  will expand `x2` to `x_{2}`.
  The same snippet can now be written using a RegExp literal as
  ```typescript
  {trigger: /([A-Za-z])(\d)/, replacement: "[[0]]_{[[1]]}", options: "A"}
  ```
  .


- You can now set regex flags in a snippet using the `flag` property on a snippet, e.g.
   ```typescript
   { trigger: "foo", replacement: "bar", options: "rA", flags: "i" },
  ```
  will replace "foo", "FOO", and "fOo" with "bar".
- For power users: you can now treat snippet files as javascript modules, with the snippets array being the default export (#219 by @duanwilliam). For example,
  ```typescript
  const SHORT_SYMBOL = "to|pm|mp"
  export default [
    { trigger: `([^\\\\])(${SHORT_SYMBOL})`, replacement: "[[0]]\\[[1]]", options: "rmA" },
  ]
  ```
  is now a valid snippet file. See #219 for more information.
- Improved setting description for snippet file location.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: - Fixed being unable to install and enable the plugin

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
- Conceal `\set`, improve concealing of operators (#216, #217 by @duanwilliam)
- Fixed math popup preview sometimes appearing when it shouldn't (#208)
- `\begin{}` and `\end{}` are now treated as text environments (#157)
- Made the snippet variable text editor larger

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
- You can now edit snippet variables such as `${GREEK}` and `${SYMBOL}` in the plugin settings (#181 by @Benjymack)
- Added `\bigcup`, `\bigcap`, `\forall` to `${SYMBOLS}`
- Added icons to section headings in settings

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: - Fixed cursor sometimes moving wrongly when using arrow keys (#203, #204)

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: - Fixed: Empty inline equations causing the app to hang

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: - Fixed: Plugin not working wtih equations in blockquotes and lists (#192, #193)

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: - Fixed: Loading snippets from file or folder not working in new files.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
- Added new snippet options: (#146 by @MultisampledNight)
  - `n` for inline math
  - `M` for block math
  - `c` for codeblocks
- You can now treat `math` codeblocks as regular equations

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: - Added setting to change autofraction symbol (e.g. \frac, \dfrac, \tfrac) by @adamhl8 (#167)

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
- Popup preview window for block math in Source mode (#138 by @StrangeGirlMurph)
- Small conceal bug fixes (#152)

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: - Conceal: Made selecting LaTeX source easier by concealing LaTeX source until the mouse is up.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
- Added ability to choose key trigger for non-auto snippets (Tab or Space) (by @StrangeGirlMurph)
- Conceal `\vec{x}`
- Fixed plugin sometimes breaking with Canvas

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
- Now compatible with Canvas

Other minor improvements:
- Added option to remove trailing whitespace at end of snippets when in inline math (by @StrangeGirlMurph in #136)
- `\tag{}` is now treated as a text environment, instead of math (by @Anti-Apple4life in #142)

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
- Conceal `\tilde{x}`
- Add default snippets for `\tilde`

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
- Conceal `_\text{}` (text in subscripts) (#96)
- Conceal `\middle` (#114)
- Fix conceal of `\gets` (#116)
- Added default snippets "+-" -> `\pm` and "-+" -> `\mp`

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
- The plugin will no longer behave erratically when an error occurs when expanding a snippet
- Added "tab" to default word delimiters

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
- Conceal `\underline`
- Conceal `\boldsymbol{greek letter}`
- Fixed conceal of `\rightarrow`
- Fixed `\infty` getting concealed as `inf∞` (#101)
- Added snippets:
  - "text" -> `\text{}`
  - "xvec" -> `\vec{x}`
  - "xund" -> `\underline{x}`
  - "greek,." -> `\boldsymbol{greek letter}`
  - "ox" -> `\otimes`
  - "o+" -> `\oplus`
- Added "$" and "+" to word delimiters
- Fixed error when expanding some snippets (e.g. "outp psi_j")

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
- Fixed "Cmd+Z" not working on Mac (#99)
- Improved color of matching bracket highlights

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
- Fixed not being able to load snippets from a folder (#95)
- Removed "to" from `${SYMBOL}`. Introduced a new snippet variable called `${SHORT_SYMBOL}`, shorthand for `to|pm|mp` (addresses #91)

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
- Snippets with longer triggers are matched against before snippets with shorter triggers. (#89)
  e.g. typing "lim" will trigger the snippet for "lim" instead of "im"
  No need to manually set the priority of longer snippets anymore.
- Added "vert" to conceal

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
- Added `\text{abc}` to conceal (#85)
- Fixed single-letter snippets at beginning of document causing plugin to crash (#86)

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
- You can now load snippets from multiple files (all files within a folder)! (#72)
  ![image](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/100622574/201482381-47844966-d396-40a3-b93e-05d1eabfd7de.png)
- Added `\langle` and `\rangle`, `\lvert` and `\rvert` to auto-enlarge brackets (#42)
- Added `\lvert` and `\rvert` to conceal
- Updated default snippets
  - "norm" now expands to "\\lvert $0 \\rvert $1"
  - Added snippets for "re" -> "\mathrm{Re}" and "im" -> "\mathrm{Im}"
  - "(", "[" and "{" will not be auto-paired when inserted before a word (#82) as they are now word boundary snippets

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
- Fix "left" being concealed as "le" (#77, #80)
- Add "[]" to super/subscript conceal
- Add "\boldsymbol" to conceal
- Added new default snippets:
  - "mp<kbd>Tab</kbd>" -> "\mp" and
  - "mbb" -> "\mathbb"

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
- Conceal:
  - Added `\bar{x}` ( $\bar{x}$ )
  - Added `\square` ( $\square$ )
- Default snippets:
  - Added "det" snippet
  - Changed "overline" to "bar"

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
- Fixed conceal of `\rightarrow` and `\leftarrow`
- Modified default snippets:
  - Disabled em dash snippets by default to prevent confusion among users
  - Fixed "<->" and "norm" snippets not triggering (#73)
- Fixed editor freezing when some snippets were triggered using Tab (#70)

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: - Symbols and greek letters in super/subscripts are now concealed. - Added "\land" and "\lor" to $SYMBOLS. - Added "del" -> "\nabla" snippet.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: You can now load snippets from a separate file! (#39) This means you can use your favourite text editor to edit your snippets. It also makes it easier to backup and share your snippets with others.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: - Improved undo behaviour. Now, pressing undo will only undo the _expansion_ of a snippet. (#57) - You can now choose whether `a+b/c` expands to `a+\frac{b}{c}` or `\frac{a+b}{c}` by choosing the auto-fraction breaking characters in settings. (#36) - Added `\partial` to symbols. - By default, the `par` snippet must now be triggered with the Tab key.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: Popup windows for inline math now show up when the cursor is just outside the $ symbols. e.g. `$x^2$|`.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: - **New feature:** popup preview window for inline math! When the cursor is inside inline math, a popup window showing the rendered math will be displayed. - Fixed conceal of `\mathbf{}` being broken. - Snippets now work when vim mode is enabled after the plugin is enabled. (#53)

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: - Fractions are now concealed! (#22, #35) `\frac{}{}` is now displayed as `()/()`. - Operators (such as `sin`, `cos`, `tan`, `exp`, `log`) are now concealed. - Subscripts and superscripts are now concealed better. - All alphabetical characters are supported, plus other mathematical symbols. - Text inside concealed superscripts/subscripts is aligned and all uses the same font. - Conceal of `\bra`, `\ket`, and `\braket` now works together with the color and highlight brackets feature.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
- You can now "tab out" of brackets by typing the closing bracket (e.g. `), ], }`) instead of having to press tab. (#46)
- Added `\geqslant` and `\leqslant` to conceal. (#48)
- "dm" is now a word boundary snippet by default.
  - This means you can type words such as "readme" without being sent into math mode.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
- Conceal basic fractions (½, ⅓, ⅔, ¼, ⅕, ⅖, ⅗, ⅘, ⅙, ⅚, ⅛, ⅜, ⅝, ⅞)
- Improved styling of headers on settings page

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
- Brackets enclosing the cursor are now highlighted.
- Added `\{` and `\}` to auto-enlarge brackets (#42)
- Added conceal of `\le`, `\ge`, and `\ne` (#41)

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
- Added snippet for bar of greek letter, e.g. `rhobar` → `\overline{\rho}` → $\overline{\rho}$
- `varphi` ($\varphi$) is now in the list of greek letters (#39)

Minor bug fixes
- Fixed conceal of some symbols (mostly set theory symbols ending in "eq")
- Added snippet for `\subseteq` (#40)

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
- New feature: color and highlight matching brackets! (#18)
- Conceal improvement: now `\dot`, `\hat` and `\overline` are concealed for all Latin letters. (#35)
- Conceal `\,`, `\:`, and `\;` (#35)
- New word delimiter option `w`. Use this option to only expand a snippet if it's preceded (and followed) by a word delimiter, such as `.`, `,`, or `-`. (#31)

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
- Now supports the new CM6 editor in Obsidian 0.15.0!

- Small bug fix: Fixed conceal of multiple characters inside `\mathcal` or `\mathbb`, e.g. $\mathcal{ABC}$

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
Bug fixes
- Fix plugin not working with old installers (#26, #29)
- Fix auto-enlarge brackets inside nested brackets (#27)

Small additions
- Conceal `\displaystyle`
- Add `\rangle` to tabout
- Add snippet for bold letter auto subscript (e.g. $\mathbf{r}_{0}$)

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: - Bug fix: fixed letters disappearing in snippets in inline math (#28)

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
- Fix issue where snippets stop working in inline math (#25: remove space at end of snippets)
- Add commands to enable/disable all features in Latex Suite (useful for when you want to temporarily disable the plugin: #27)

Conceal fixes/additions:
- Fix conceal of "\qeq" and "\cdot"
- Conceal "\sum\limits" and "\lim\limits" (#22)
- Conceal "\mathrm"

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: - Fixed obsidian freezing when cursor placed at end of `$\text{}$` (#23)

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
- New feature: conceal! Makes equations more readable by hiding LaTeX code, like in vimtex. Enable in settings.


- Fixed tabout not working in \text{} (#17)
- Remove all tabstops when the cursor enters the last tabstop

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: - Bug fix: when using vim mode, only insert snippets while in insert mode.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
- Fix tabout interfering with list indent behaviour
- Only run editor commands while inside math

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
- Mobile support
- Allow spaces after greek letters in auto-fraction
- Add warning when using legacy editor

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
- Add undo
- Work directly with CM6 EditorView

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: Initial release
